title: Action under Section 8(1)(b) against Shri Rajbali Paswan, absconder

S^^m, •STRATI aif^RT, ^ P 7 ^ W ^ T "8$, TJH-18/38, ^TcT feKT #T "RPf, H3WT, ^ T C , ^RFRTT-221002 ^ WW "jqt^fcT ?ft TO T^?T ^cft t I [TO U 801/2/2006-^ 3 ^ zt TT=f ^t -qt t^T] MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) ORDER New Delhi, the 19th July, 2006 S.0.1137(E).—Whereas, the Joint Secretary to the Government of India, Ministry of Finance, Department of Revenue, specially empowered under sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the Prevention of Illicit Traffic in Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act, 1988 issued Order F. No. 801/2/2006-PITNDPS dated 10-3-2006 under the said sub-section directing that Shri Rajbali Paswan S/o Shri Sohrai Ram R/o Gausganj, Gangipul, near Samshan Ghat, Ara (Bihar), be detained and kept in custody in the Central Jail, Buxur (Bihar) with a view to preventing him from engaging in illicit trafficking of Narcotic Drugs. 2208 GI/2006 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PARTII—Sir.3(ii)j " 2. Whereas, the Central Government has reason to believe that the aforesaid person has absconded or is concealing himself so that the order cannot be executed; 3. Now, therefore, in exercise of powers conferred by clause (b) of sub-section (1) of Section 8 of the said Act, the Centnjt Government hereby directs the aforesaid person to appear before Shri N. N. Upadhayay, Intelligence Officer. Narcoffes Control Bureau, S-18/38, Lalit Behari Sen Marg, Taxal, Nadesar, Varanasi-221002, within 10 days of the publication of thisirtftr in the Official Gazette. "?mf, sr^i ^ f s n ORDER New Delhi, the 19th July, 2006 S.O. 1138(E).—Whereas, the Joint Secretary to the Government of India, Ministry of Finance, Department oi Revenue, specially empowered under sub-scciion (1) of Section 3 of the Prevention of Illicit Traffic in Narcotic Drugs and PsychotropicSubstances Act, 1988 issued Order F. No. 801/3/2006-PITNDPS dated 10-3-2006 under the said sub-section directing that Shri Hemant Kumar, S/o Shri Bhagwan Ram, R/o Gausganj, Gangipul. near Samshan Ghat. Ara (Bihar), he detained and kept in custody in the Central Jail, Buxur (Bihar) with a view to preventing him from engaging in illicit trafficking uf Narcotic Drugs. 2. Whereas, the Central Government has reason to believe that the aforesaid person has absconded or is concealing himself so that the Order cannot be executed; 3. Now, therefore, in exercise of powers conferred by clause (b) of sub-section (1) of Section 8 of the said Act. the Central Government hereby directs the aforesaid person to appear before Shri N. N. Upadhayay, Intelligence Officer. Narcotics Control Bureau, S-18/38, Lalit Behari Sen Marg, Taxal, Nadesar, Varanasi-221002. within 10 days of the publication of this Order in the Official Gazette. IF. No. 801/3/2006-PITNDPSI V.K. SHARMA, Under Secy. Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri.
